title: Numeric Constant
text: Numeric Constant A number can be given as an integer or a decimal, for example, 123 or 1.23 are both acceptable. If you want to use scientific (or exponential) notation for a number in an expression, you must enclose the number in double quotation marks ("). For example, Uniface correctly evaluates the following expression: TOTAL_TAX = 1.2 * "1.2E4" Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
